frames.title: Rotating hydroponic rings
frames.description: Concentric nutrient film channels spin at 2 RPM in microgravity — delivering uniform root exposure, oxygenation, and LED photoperiod cycles across 12 crop varieties simultaneously.
frames.alt: Rotating hydroponic growing rings in a space greenhouse

frames.title: Adaptive LED spectrum tuning
frames.description: Full-spectrum tunable arrays shift from 660 nm red to 450 nm blue across growth phases — maximizing photosynthetic efficiency while cutting energy draw by 40% versus static lighting.
frames.alt: Purple and pink LED grow lights over space station plants

frames.title: Microgravity pollination drones
frames.description: Palm-sized electrostatic drones carry pollen between flowering nodes in zero-G — replacing wind and insect vectors that do not exist aboard orbital greenhouses.
frames.alt: Small drone pollinating plants in a space greenhouse module

frames.title: Closed-loop water reclamation
frames.description: Condensate capture, UV sterilization, and ion-exchange polish every drop — achieving 97% water recirculation and reducing resupply mass from Earth by tonnes per year.
frames.alt: Water reclamation system with clear tubing in space habitat

frames.title: Multispectral crop vision
frames.description: Hyperspectral cameras detect chlorophyll stress and nitrogen deficiency 72 hours before visible wilting — triggering autonomous nutrient injections via the ring irrigation bus.
frames.alt: Multispectral imaging dashboard monitoring crop health

frames.title: Precision harvest robotics
frames.description: Soft-grip manipulators identify ripeness via firmness sensors and color index — cutting and bagging produce in vacuum-sealed pouches ready for crew consumption or cold storage.
frames.alt: Robotic arm harvesting vegetables in automated greenhouse
